title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">📌</font> Final Questions for Version 6.0</
content:
📌 Final Questions for Version 6.0

1. Should there be an in-class event where the XP leaders and lowest XP earners team up for a final cooperative challenge?

✔ This would force engagement between top and bottom performers.
✔ Example: A group challenge where XP leaders must “protect” weaker players.

2. Should students be able to “change alignments” once if they complete a special challenge?

✔ If yes, should it be a one-time event, or should it have escalating costs?

3. Should the “True Ending” be a collaborative event, or should it be a solo challenge?

✔ If collaborative, only one group can win it.
✔ If solo, only one student can achieve the True Ending.

🚀 Version 6.0 now finalizes the secret alignment system, XP scarcity, practical XP leader rewards, and structured performance handicaps.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 252 (chunk 252/555)
